creator: cheunghonyu@gmail.com
text:
Hello cs@freebsd.org

The attached file is patch_revision.txt to fix pkg-plist bugs

Thank you

Lawrence Cheung

>> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] deskutils/rednotebook: update to 1.5.0
>>
>> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
>> State-Changed-By: cs
>> State-Changed-When: Fri Jul 20 18:57:04 UTC 2012
>> State-Changed-Why:
>> My tinderbox gives me the following error:
